tribute.donationsHint: Tips for the current month (UTC). If it stays «—» for long — check webhook URL in Tribute.
tribute.noEvents: No webhook events for {{period}}. In Tribute → Settings → Webhooks paste the URL from Integrations.

fanvue.title: Fanvue
fanvue.body: Multiple creator accounts. Model on connection — chats inherit it automatically.
fanvue.companionOverrideHint: Default mode for all chats. Can override per chat in the thread header.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.body: Instagram Business / Creator Direct messages. Reply window — 24 hours after the fan's last message.
instagram.inDevelopmentBanner: Instagram Direct integration is still in development. Account connection is temporarily unavailable — we'll notify you when it's ready.
instagram.step1: Select a model and click «Add Instagram» — sign in with a Business or Creator account.
instagram.step2: New DMs appear under Chats → Instagram. Reply within 24 h.

tribute.title: Tribute
tribute.body: Tips and subscriptions via <link>Tribute API</link>. Setup steps below. Chatter share in KPI is set per member in Team.
tribute.step1: In Tribute creator panel: ⋯ → Settings → API Keys → Generate API Key — copy the key.
tribute.step2: Here: select model (which profile revenue belongs to), paste API key and click «Add Tribute».
tribute.step3: After saving copy Webhook URL from the connection card into Tribute: Settings → API → Webhooks.
tribute.step4: New payments arrive via webhook, are stored in DB and appear in Overview KPI.
tribute.apiKeyPlaceholder: Api-Key from Tribute → Settings → API Keys

llm.title: Text model (studio)
llm.body: Studio prompts and vision always use the AI key set by admin on the server (OPENAI_API_KEY / compatible base). Fields below are unused by studio and kept for future use.

companionFeedback.title: AI companion · feedback
companionFeedback.body: Nightly summary of 👍/👎 on bot replies. Rate messages in chat — report updates automatically.
companionFeedback.empty: No reports yet — they appear after first ratings and nightly run.

modelsExt.appendHint: For upload: specify frame type for each file.
modelsExt.personaLead: Chat bot personality: where they live, interests, communication style. Bot uses this with appearance description.
modelsExt.backstoryPlaceholder: where they're from, what they do, what matters…
modelsExt.exportPhoneLead: Phone reference EXIF matters more than preset. EXIF date — when saving frame. GEO — optional. Selfie or main camera — toggle on Images page when generating.
modelsExt.teamKpiEmpty: KPI will appear after first chatter replies in the period.
modelsExt.snippetsLead: Buttons appear above the composer for quick text insertion.

health.modeLine: Mode: {{mode}} · total in DB: {{conversations}} chats, {{messages}} messages
health.studioTextUnavailable: · studio: text model unavailable on server

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Browser notifications for new chat messages.
notifications.denied: Allow notifications for this site in browser settings.
notifications.serverDisabled: Push notifications are not enabled on the server.

team.membersEmpty: No one yet — add the first member above.
team.deleteMemberConfirm: Remove member? Their access will be revoked.
